features: White Jasmine scent – Pure, light floral fragrance for a clean, airy atmosphere
Eliminates odours – Powered by OdourClear Technology for effective freshness
Versatile use – Great for living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchens, and more
Long-lasting freshness – Instantly refreshes any space with a few sprays
6 x 185ml value pack – Convenient multipack ideal for daily household use
description: Febreze Air Mist Spray – White Jasmine Scent (Pack of 6 x 185ml) Infuse your home with the pure, airy floral scent of Febreze White Jasmine . This light yet uplifting fragrance eliminates unwanted odours and brings a refreshing burst of long-lasting freshness to any room. Formulated with OdourClear Technology , Febreze Air Mist doesn't just mask odours – it eliminates them at the source, leaving your home noticeably fresh and clean. Perfect for daily use in living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, and hallways. Includes: 6 x 185ml Febreze Air Mist White Jasmine
